shadcn-html / form

Built with: CSS

Form

Consistent field layout for forms. Built on native <form> with .form-field spacing and .form-actions button row.

Component Specification — components/form/form.md

Native basis

<form> element with consistent field layout using Label, Input, and description/error helpers.

Web Platform APIs

<form> <fieldset> Constraint Validation API

Classes

.form .form-field .form-actions .form-field-inline .label

Notes

• .form-field provides consistent vertical spacing between fields.

• .form-actions provides a flex row for submit/reset buttons.

• No JavaScript needed for basic forms — use native validation.

• Compose with Label, Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, etc.

Default

Simple form with labeled fields.

Your full name.

<form class="form">
  <div class="form-field">
    <label class="label" for="name">Name</label>
    <input class="input" type="text" id="name" required>
    <p class="field-description">Your full name.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn" type="submit">Submit</button>
  </div>
</form>

Inline fields

Checkbox and switch in a form.

<div class="form-field-inline">
  <input class="checkbox" type="checkbox" id="terms">
  <label for="terms">Accept terms</label>
</div>

CSS view file

/* -- Form component --------------------------------------------- */

@layer components {
  .form {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1.5rem;
  }

  .form-field {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .form-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    align-items: center;
    padding-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  /* -- Inline field (checkbox, switch, radio inline) -------- */
  .form-field-inline {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;

    & > .label {
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }
  }
}
